curation.synopsis: When the White Consuls answer a distress call from the void, they expect a rescue. What waits for them is far worse than the plea suggested. As a psychic shockwave tears through their astropathic choir, the Space Marines realise they have been drawn into a design far older and subtler than any battle plan. Kairos Fateweaver, the twin-headed oracle of Tzeentch and master of every twisting probability, has been moving them like pieces on a board since long before they arrived. To break free of the daemon's web, the White Consuls must contend with an enemy who has already foreseen every move they might make.
